intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered — UPPER band of the 65-72 m² floor range, NO CARPORT. 12.5x12.5 lot gives an 8.5x8.5 envelope = 72.25 m² floor (clean rectangle, no L-cut). Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; bath block between master (front) and standard (rear). Open-plan great room + kitchen.
must_haves: common bath publicly accessible from great room
clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
